prompt: Morph the seagull’s beak into a giant USB port and have green data streams flowing into it.

objects: seagull in the upper portion of the image
large, rectangular USB port (replacing the seagull's beak)

text "And if they get me take this spike and" (in the upper portion)

text "YOU PUT THE SPIKE IN MY HEAAART" (in the lower portion)
